---
title: "Announcement about Midterm, MAD213 Basic Statistics, on November 20" 
description: "Postpone"
date: 2020-11-19T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

Dear all,

`r emo::ji("loudspeaker")` MAD213 - MIDTERM 1

Midterm of Basic Statistics tomorrow is postponed. Your midterm exam will be on November 27, 2020. There will be no class for tomorrow.

We will be having discussion about exam rules via Zoom, prior to the exam next week, which will be starting at 10h00 as usual, like we did at lectures.

See you at November 27, 2020 at 10h00.

Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("bar_chart")`
